LanguageData.RTRS_Desc_LastSave: Real-world time of the last game save
LanguageData.RTRS_Desc_SaveDiff: Time elapsed since the last game save
LanguageData.RTRS_Desc_Source: Data source of the current weather
LanguageData.RTRS_Desc_SolarTerm: Current traditional solar term or season simulation
LanguageData.RTRS_Desc_IsExternal: Returns 'true' if the sender is an external observer (Discord/KOOK/QQ)
LanguageData.RTRS_Desc_SenderName: Name of the message sender (Player or Observer)
LanguageData.RTRS_Desc_HasImage: Returns 'true' if an image is attached to the request
LanguageData.RTRS_Desc_ImageTag: The raw image code block for LLM parsing
LanguageData.RTRS_Gizmo_SyncAvatar_Desc: Force the RimPhone system to take a new picture of this entity and upload it to the server.
LanguageData.RTRS_Msg_MissingDiscordAuth: Discord Bot Token or Channel ID is missing in settings.
LanguageData.RTRS_Msg_MissingKookAuth: KOOK Bot Token or Channel ID is missing in settings.
LanguageData.RTRS_Msg_CloudSyncComplete: Cloud Sync Complete: Image URL injected to {0}!
LanguageData.RTRS_Msg_ProcessImageFailed: Failed to process image data. Check dev log.
LanguageData.RTRS_Prompt_ImageDirective: [System Directive: Cross-Dimensional Communication] The high-dimensional observer '{0}' sent an image/message directly to you: "{1}" (Rule: You must actively respond to this message in your next turn!)
LanguageData.RTRS_ApiNone: None (Disable real weather, use seasonal simulation)
LanguageData.RTRS_CityTooltip: Enter Pinyin or English, e.g., Beijing, London, NewYork.
LanguageData.RTRS_OpenWeatherKeyTip: Please get your Weather API Key from the official OpenWeather website.\n\nWARNING: Do NOT enter your RimTalk Large Language Model (e.g., OpenAI) chat API Key here! They are not interchangeable!
LanguageData.RTRS_HeWeatherKeyTip: Please get your Weather API Key from the official QWeather Console.\n\nWARNING: Do NOT enter your RimTalk Large Language Model (e.g., OpenAI) chat API Key here! They are not interchangeable!
LanguageData.RTRS_HeWeatherHostTip: Please check your QWeather Console -> Settings for your dedicated API Host (e.g., pw6xxx.qweatherapi.com).
LanguageData.RTRS_UseCelsiusTooltip: Uncheck this to use Fahrenheit instead.
LanguageData.RTRS_DebugModeTooltip: Print detailed logs to the developer console for asynchronous weather updates and variable registrations.
LanguageData.RTRS_TestAPI_None: Cannot test: Please select a valid Weather API source above.
LanguageData.RTRS_TestAPI_EmptyKey: Cannot test: API Key cannot be empty. Please enter your key.
LanguageData.RTRS_TestAPI_Fail: Connection Failed! Please open the developer console (Debug Log) for details on the server response.
LanguageData.RTRS_Error_EmptyHost: Connection Aborted: QWeather's API Host cannot be empty! Please enter your dedicated host in the Mod Settings.
LanguageData.RTRS_AegisAuthDesc: Link your Discord/KOOK account to assume the 'Player' identity in-game.
LanguageData.RTRS_LoginInstruction: Type /login {0} in Discord or KOOK to bind your soul.
LanguageData.RTRS_BroadcastDiscordDesc: If enabled, colonist talks will be sent to Discord.
LanguageData.RTRS_BroadcastKookDesc: If enabled, colonist talks will be sent to KOOK.
LanguageData.RTRS_BroadcastQQDesc: If enabled, colonist talks will be sent to QQ Channels.
LanguageData.RTRS_KookNotice: Notice: KOOK uses direct API calls; no Webhook required.
LanguageData.RTRS_LockAllAvatarsDesc: Saves API usage. When checked, no new portraits will be uploaded.
LanguageData.RTRS_PauseOnImageDesc: If checked, opening a full image will freeze the colony simulation.
LanguageData.RTRS_Msg_ForceUnlinked: **[System Notice]** Commander `{0}` has forcibly disconnected from the local terminal. The Gods have averted their gaze.
LanguageData.RTRS_Msg_MustSelectImage: You must select an image from the gallery first!
LanguageData.RTRS_Msg_UploadingImage: Uploading compressed image to quantum cloud...
LanguageData.RTRS_MsgApp_NoMessages: No messages received.\nCheck Mod Settings & Sync.
LanguageData.RTRS_Viewer_Controls: Scroll: Zoom | Drag: Pan | Left/Right: Switch
LanguageData.RTRS_Msg_CriticalErrorNoColonist: Critical Error: Unable to locate a valid colonist or Player entity.
LanguageData.RTRS_Msg_PersonaInjected: **[System Notice]** Observer `{0}` ({1}), your high-dimensional soul persona has been injected into the RimWorld knowledge base.\n**Active Tags**: `{2}`\n**Match Mode**: `{3}`
LanguageData.RTRS_Msg_PersonaRemoved: **[System Notice]** Observer `{0}` ({1}), your high-dimensional persona has been successfully logged out.
LanguageData.RTRS_KookSystemAvatarNotice: Notice: The KOOK platform does not support dynamic custom system avatars.
LanguageData.RTRS_ShowSyncAvatarGizmoDesc: If disabled, the manual sync avatar icon will be hidden from the pawn's command bar to keep the combat UI clean. Automatic background sync will still function.
